Young swordsman locks blades with crimson-eyed rival, shockwave ring erupts, sparks fountain outward, cracked earth spirals beneath their feet.
Lightning-scarred warrior roars as golden aura explodes upward, hair levitating, eyes blazing white, ground shattering in concentric circles around him.
Hooded mage thrusts palms forward, twin energy beams collide mid-air with enemy's blast, sky splits apart revealing dimensional rift.
Speed-type fighter vanishes in blur-dash, seven afterimages trail behind, reappears above opponent with fist cocked back for impact frame.
Bandaged monk delivers spinning kick, circular shockwave radiates from impact point, opponent's face distorts from force, buildings shake violently.
Flame-wielder screams technique name, phoenix-shaped inferno erupts from sword, background goes black except blazing orange silhouette and kanji.
Two cloaked assassins face off on moonlit rooftop, kunai drawn, wind whipping fabric dramatically, city lights glittering far below.
Bare-chested brawler and armored giant clash in arena center, fists colliding, crowd silhouettes roaring, massive dust cloud explosion rising.
Silver-haired slayer drives glowing blade through shadow demon's chest, black blood arcing outward, heroic pose against full moon backdrop.
Tattooed warrior releases chakra as massive tiger spirit materializes around body, blue energy crackling, eyes glowing with ancestral power within.
Dual-sword user crosses blades in X-formation, blocking descending greatsword, metal shrieks, white-hot sparks showering down like fireworks display.
Dark sorcerer's body erupts with purple-black energy, wings manifesting from back, third eye opening, stone temple floor cracking outward radially.
Charging beam warrior braces stance, hands cupped at side gathering sphere of destruction, lightning arcing between fingers, ground glowing beneath.
Agile rogue dashes forward leaving motion-blur trail, coat tails streaming, single katana extended for piercing thrust toward shadowed enemy.
Muscular striker launches flying superman punch, fist engulfed in swirling wind pressure, opponent's shocked face filling foreground with dramatic foreshortening.
Ice-element user slams palm down screaming forbidden technique, massive frozen dragon rises coiling upward, arena floor freezing in spreading pattern.
Scarred veteran and young prodigy stand on cliff edge at sunset, weapons drawn, grass and cloaks billowing, storm clouds gathering overhead.
Two tournament finalists exchange rapid blur punches, speed lines radiating outward, impact flashes between fists, referee and crowd frozen watching.
Holy knight drives light-wreathed spear through scaled beast's throat, radiant blood spray, divine symbols glowing across armor in moment of triumph.
Cursed warrior screams as demonic red aura takes skull shape around head, chains breaking, eyes bleeding, power overwhelming fragile human vessel.
Rival captains cross cutlass and saber on ship mast, rain pouring, lightning flash silhouette, ocean waves crashing violently during storm.
Fire-fist brawler and ice-palm martial artist clash techniques, steam explosion at collision point, yin-yang energy spiral, ground becoming half-frozen half-scorched.
Shadow assassin emerges from darkness behind target, dagger raised high, purple speed lines, victim's eyes widening in slow-motion realization frame.
Ancient master releases millennium of stored energy, golden Buddha form manifesting behind him, temple trembling, disciples shielding eyes from blinding radiance.
Desperate underdog roars final desperate attack, broken sword glowing impossibly bright, charging through impossible odds, background fading to pure white light.
